# Nested Lists

This file tests deep list nesting and task lists.

## Nested Unordered Lists
* Level 1
  * Level 2
    * Level 3
      * Level 4
        * Level 5

## Nested Ordered Lists
1. One
   1. One point one
      1. One point one point one
2. Two

## Mixed Lists
* Bullet 1
  1. Sub-number 1
  2. Sub-number 2
* Bullet 2

## Task Lists
- [x] Completed task
- [ ] Pending task
  - [x] Sub-task complete
  - [ ] Sub-task pending
